import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const InfoDriver = () => { const [trucks, setTrucks] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/trucks') .then((res) => res.json()) .then((data) => setTrucks(data)) .catch((err) => console.error("Failed to fetch trucks:", err)); }, []); return (
{/* Sidebar */}

Admin

Master Data
Tracking
Info Driver
Settings
Logout
{/* Main Content */}

Info Driver

{trucks.length === 0 ? (

Belum ada data truk tersedia.

) : ( trucks.map((truck) => (

Truck ID: {truck.id}

Type: {truck.type === 'fuso' ? 'Truck Fuso' : 'Dump Truck'}

Plat Nomor: {truck.plateNumber || '-'}

Driver: {truck.driver || '-'}

Kontak: {truck.contact || '-'}

Status: {truck.status}

Tanggal Input: {truck.timestamp?.split('T')[0]}

)) )}
); }; export default InfoDriver;
